title: HomeLab #1: MikroTik as a Home Router
excerpt: Proceed at your own risk! (... it's worth it)
content_html:
How it all begin…

From some time, I had a second though about getting my homelab. I wanted to play with my own projects without relying on cloud providers or to have my own storage space to store backups as prices of cloud storage are getting more expensive.

No homelab can be complete without a prior proper networking setup. Given my experiences related to performance and security issues with ISP-provider routers, I wanted to have a better control over the traffic on my home network. I decided to heavily focus traffic on wired connections, to offload WiFi and ensure connection between devices over local network are as fast as possible.

That’s where Mikrotik L009UiGS-RM comes in play. It has enough Gigabit Ethernet ports to connect all my Ethernet ports on the walls. PoE is a nice bonus too, as I can power my access point without having to use a wall wart. The router has a small form factor, which made it possible to mount on the wall.

Know your ISP

Nevertheless, before I touched the router, I needed to find out how your ISP actually hands off the Internet connection as it’s not that easy. Two things decide your setup, and they are independent of each other: how the WAN authenticates, and what kind of IPv4 address it gets. Quick Google search on tech forums or asking the ISP support line will usually get you the answer.

IPoE or PPPoE

In Poland, some providers plug in an Ethernet cable and hand you an address over DHCP; this is IPoE1. Others require a PPPoE2 username and password, sometimes over a dedicated VLAN3. The right setup path depends entirely on this detail.

ProtocolWhat your ISP gives youTypical setup on MikroTik
IPoEIP address, gateway, DNS via DHCP on the WANAdd DHCP client on the WAN port
PPPoEUsername and password, sometimes over a VLANCreate VLAN if needed, then add PPPoE client

Public or private WAN IPv4

The protocol only tells you how the router logs in. Separately, check whether the address you receive is public or private, because a private IPv4 address on the WAN port always means CGNAT4: your ISP shares one public IPv4 among many customers and translates it upstream, so nothing routes back to you unsolicited.

WAN IPv4What it meansImpact
PublicA routable address dedicated to your linePort forwarding, UPnP, and inbound connections work normally
Private (CGNAT)A shared address behind the ISP’s NATInbound connections generally don’t work unless the ISP sells a public IPv4 add-on

Warning: DS-Lite caveat.

DS-Lite is the strictest form of CGNAT: the WAN gets no IPv4 address at all, only a public IPv6 address, and IPv4 traffic is tunneled inside IPv6 to the ISP’s AFTR5. MikroTik supports the DS-Lite tunnel itself, but it doesn’t support automatically receiving the AFTR address needed to establish it. Because there’s no public IPv4 anywhere in the path, port forwarding, UPnP, inbound connections, and many remote-access tools stop working.

If your ISP offers DS-Lite or private IPv4 and you need inbound IPv4 access, ask about a paid public IPv4 add-on before you buy the router or consider switching to other ISP.

For my fiber connection, the ISP uses PPPoE over VLAN 35 with a private IPv4 address. The rest of this post follows that path.

Setting up MikroTik router

Start by powering on the router. Run an Ethernet cable from your laptop to any LAN port on the MikroTik, typically any port numbered 2 or higher. Leave port 1 free for the ONT uplink; that becomes your WAN port later. Open WinBox, switch to the Neighbors tab, and you should see the router listed at 192.168.88.1 (or its default MAC address). Log in using the admin user with no password, then change the default admin password immediately, because RouterOS still ships with blank or default credentials on some units. After that, run through Quick Set just enough to give the router a stable management address and local subnet. You will come back later to tear out the default wireless bridge and replace it with a cleaner configuration.

Getting Internet

The optical network terminal6 sits at the edge of your home network. Run an Ethernet cable from the ONT to port 1 on the MikroTik. Once the link light comes up, the router can see the carrier signal.

Some ISPs (mine included) bind the service to the MAC address of the router they shipped. Plug in a MikroTik with a different MAC and the connection never authenticates, even when the VLAN and PPPoE settings are correct. The fix is to clone the original router’s MAC onto the WAN port. You can read that MAC from the sticker on the ISP router or from its status page.

Clone it onto ether1. Because the VLAN interface and the PPPoE client both ride on ether1, they inherit this MAC automatically, so the ISP sees the address it expects.

# Check the current MAC before changing it
/interface ethernet print where name=ether1
# Flags: X - disabled, R - running, S - slave
#  #    NAME    MTU  MAC-ADDRESS        ARP     SWITCH
#  0  R ether1  1500 48:A9:8A:11:22:33  enabled switch1
# Clone the ISP router's MAC (replace with the address from its label)
/interface ethernet set ether1 mac-address=AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
# Confirm the WAN port now advertises the cloned MAC
/interface ethernet print where name=ether1
# Flags: X - disabled, R - running, S - slave
#  #    NAME    MTU  MAC-ADDRESS        ARP     SWITCH
#  0  R ether1  1500 AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF  enabled switch1

The cloned MAC persists across reboots. If you ever move the connection back to the original router, revert with /interface ethernet reset-mac-address ether1 to restore the port’s factory address.

My ISP tags the PPPoE traffic with VLAN 35. RouterOS needs a VLAN interface on top of ether1 before it can speak PPPoE. Add it with a descriptive name so future-you does not have to guess what vlan1 means.

/interface vlan add name=internet-vlan-35 vlan-id=35 interface=ether1
/interface vlan print
# Flags: X - disabled, I - invalid, D - dynamic
#  NAME               MTU  ARP  VLAN-ID  INTERFACE
# 0 internet-vlan-35  1500  enabled  35       ether1

With the VLAN in place, create the PPPoE client. Tell it to use the VLAN interface, accept the default route from the ISP, and use the ISP’s DNS servers. Leave the username and password empty at first; you will fill those in once the interface exists.

/interface pppoe-client add name=pppoe-out1 interface=internet-vlan-35 \
    add-default-route=yes use-peer-dns=yes disabled=no
/interface pppoe-client print
# Flags: X - disabled, I - invalid, R - running, D - dynamic
#  NAME        MTU   INTERFACE          USER  SERVICE  CALLER-ID  ENCODING  STATUS
# 0 pppoe-out1  auto  internet-vlan-35         internet                    linking

Now set the credentials your ISP provided. The status should change from linking to connected within a few seconds.

/interface pppoe-client set pppoe-out1 user=YOUR_ISP_USERNAME password=YOUR_ISP_PASSWORD
/interface pppoe-client print
# Flags: X - disabled, I - invalid, R - running, D - dynamic
#  NAME        MTU   INTERFACE          USER              SERVICE  CALLER-ID  ENCODING  STATUS
# 0 R pppoe-out1  auto  internet-vlan-35   YOUR_ISP_USERNAME  internet              connected

Confirm the default route appeared. If the output shows pppoe-out1 as the gateway, traffic can reach the Internet.

/ip route print where dst-address=0.0.0.0/0
# Flags: D - dynamic; X - disabled, R - running, S - static; + - active
#  DST-ADDRESS     PREF-SRC  GATEWAY           DISTANCE
# D 0.0.0.0/0               pppoe-out1        1

Let’s get clean WiFi setup

For wireless, I use a separate wAP access point powered over Ethernet7. Port 8 on the router feeds both data and power to the AP. Enable PoE output on that port, and the wAP boots without a wall wart.

# Physical step: run an Ethernet cable from router port 8 (ether8) to the wAP AP.
# Then enable PoE output on port 8 so the wAP powers up:
/interface ethernet poe set ether8 poe-out=auto-on
/interface ethernet poe print
# NAME   POE-OUT   VOLTAGE  CURRENT
# ether8 auto-on   24.0V    210mA

Managing every AP individually does not scale. RouterOS includes CAPsMAN, which lets the router act as a central controller. You define a single security profile and datapath, plus channel templates for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz, and the access point downloads that configuration automatically.

On the controller, create the shared objects first.

# --- On the router (CAPsMAN controller) ---
/interface wifi security add name=home-sec \
    authentication-types=wpa2-psk,wpa3-psk \
    wps=disable passphrase=YOUR_WIFI_PASSWORD
/interface wifi channel add name=ch-2ghz band=2ghz-n width=20mhz
/interface wifi channel add name=ch-5ghz band=5ghz-ac width=20/40mhz
/interface wifi datapath add name=home-dp bridge=bridge disabled=no
/interface wifi configuration add name=home-2g ssid=HomeNetwork \
    country=YOUR_COUNTRY security=home-sec channel=ch-2ghz datapath=home-dp mode=ap
/interface wifi configuration add name=home-5g ssid=HomeNetwork \
    country=YOUR_COUNTRY security=home-sec channel=ch-5ghz datapath=home-dp mode=ap
/interface wifi capsman set enabled=yes interfaces=bridge
/interface wifi provisioning add action=create-dynamic-enabled \
    master-configuration=home-2g supported-bands=2ghz-n
/interface wifi provisioning add action=create-dynamic-enabled \
    master-configuration=home-5g supported-bands=5ghz-ac
# Verify the controller is listening
/interface wifi capsman print
#            enabled: yes
#           package: wifi-qcom
#        interfaces: bridge
# require-peer-certificate: no
#     upgrade-policy: none

On the access point, enable CAP mode and point the radios at the manager.

# --- On the wAP (CAP / managed AP) ---
/interface wifi cap set enabled=yes discovery-interfaces=bridge
/interface wifi set wifi1 configuration.manager=capsman disabled=no
/interface wifi set wifi2 configuration.manager=capsman disabled=no
# Verify the wAP has joined the controller
/interface wifi cap print
#        enabled: yes
# discovery-interfaces: bridge
#   caps-man-addresses:
#   caps-man-names:

Back on the controller, you should see dynamic radio entries appear. Each radio adopts the configuration that matches its band.

# Back on the controller, check that managed radios appeared
/interface wifi print
# Flags: D - dynamic
#    #    NAME                                              TYPE       ACTUAL-CONFIGURATION
#    0  D  cap1@2.4GHz                                       wifi       home-2g
#    1  D  cap1@5GHz                                         wifi       home-5g

Fighting Bufferbloat

During a typical evening at the weekend, I noticed something strange. I was playing Counter-Strike, but then it started lagging tue to ping flactuations. It turned out an iOS update starts on another device and a phone begins uploading photos into cloud backup. The culprit was bufferbloat.

Bufferbloat is excessive latency caused by overfilled packet queues inside network equipment. It shows up when a link becomes saturated, because large buffers hold packets instead of dropping or marking them quickly. Real-time traffic then waits behind bulk transfers.

Source: Bufferbloat.net

The queue fills and latency spikes, leaving game packets stuck behind a backlog of bulk traffic.

With no competing traffic, the latency stays low. The game sends small packets, and the queue rarely holds more than a frame or two.

A download starts on another device. The buffers absorb the burst but do not drain fast enough, so latency climbs as game packets wait behind it.

An upload joins the mix, and upload queues are usually the worst offender on asymmetric links. The game now faces queuing in both directions.

The buffer is full. Even tiny game packets wait until the bulk traffic ahead of them clears, which shows up as rubber-banding and delayed voice chat.

You can measure this with online tests; I use the Cloudflare Speed Test at speed.cloudflare.com. It reports both loaded and unloaded latency so you can read the bufferbloat grade directly. DSLReports used to be the reference, but the site shut down in March 2025. You can still get a rough picture by running any speed test while pinging a stable host in a terminal.

FQ-CoDel to the rescue

RouterOS supports several queue disciplines. The default FIFO queue simply stores packets in the order it receives them. When the link is full, every flow waits behind every other flow. FQ-CoDel8 splits traffic into many small flows and gives each one a fair turn, dropping packets that linger in the queue. This keeps latency low without complex firewall mangle rules.

Queue disciplineHow it handles congestionBest for
FIFO (default-small)One shared queue; first in, first outLow congestion, uniform traffic
FQ-CoDelPer-flow fairness with active delay controlGaming and VoIP on shared links

To use FQ-CoDel, first create a queue type since RouterOS does not include one by default.

/queue type add name=fq-codel kind=fq-codel
/queue type print where name=fq-codel
# Flags: * - default, X - disabled, I - invalid, D - dynamic
#  0   name="fq-codel" kind=fq-codel fq-codel-target=5ms fq-codel-interval=100ms \
#      fq-codel-ecn=yes fq-codel-flows=1024 fq-codel-quantum=1514 \
#      fq-codel-limit=10240 fq-codel-memlimit=32.0MiB

The default parameters are a sensible starting point. The target of 5 ms defines the acceptable standing queue delay. The interval of 100 ms matches a rough worst-case RTT budget.

The important part is the max-limit. It must sit below your real line rate, not at it. If you shape at 100 % of the link, the ISP’s equipment still saturates first and the bloated queue forms there, outside your control. A common rule of thumb is to set the limit to about 90–95 % of the measured download and upload speeds. That keeps the bottleneck on your router, where FQ-CoDel can actually manage the queue.

Replace the placeholders below with your own measured values: the first number is upload, the second is download.

/queue simple add name=shaping target=pppoe-out1 max-limit=<0.9xUPLOAD>M/<0.9xDOWNLOAD>M \
    queue=fq-codel/fq-codel total-queue=fq-codel
/queue simple print where name=shaping
# Flags: X - disabled, I - invalid; D - dynamic
#  0   name="shaping" target=pppoe-out1 dst-address=0.0.0.0/0 \
#      interface=all parent=none priority=8/8 queue=fq-codel/fq-codel \
#      limit-at=0/0 max-limit=<0.9xUPLOAD>M/<0.9xDOWNLOAD>M burst-limit=0/0 burst-threshold=0/0 \
#      burst-time=0s/0s bucket-size=0.1/0.1 total-queue=fq-codel

Simple queues do not apply to packets that are fast-tracked by the firewall. Fast Track bypasses the queue subsystem for performance. For the queue to work, disable the fasttrack rule or remove it entirely.

# Find the fasttrack rule
/ip firewall filter print where action=fasttrack-connection

If a rule exists, either disable it or remove it. Be careful: removing fasttrack increases CPU load on high-throughput links. On a modern MikroTik with a CPU that can handle line-rate forwarding, the trade-off is worth it for latency.

# Option A: disable the rule
/ip firewall filter disable [find action=fasttrack-connection]

# Option B: remove it entirely
/ip firewall filter remove [find action=fasttrack-connection]

After making the change, run the Cloudflare Speed Test again. You should see the bufferbloat grade improve, especially under upload load.

Footnotes

  1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IPoE ↩

  2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Point-to-Point_Protocol_over_Ethernet ↩

  3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Virtual_LAN ↩

  4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Carrier-grade_NAT ↩

  5. Address Family Transition Router. The AFTR is the ISP-side endpoint of the IPv4-in-IPv6 tunnel in DS-Lite: it decapsulates subscriber IPv4 traffic, performs NAT, and routes it to the IPv4 Internet. (https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6333) ↩

  6. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Optical_network_terminal ↩

  7. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Power_over_Ethernet ↩

  8. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/FQ-CoDel ↩

Replace the placeholders below with your own measured values: the first number is upload, the second is download. /queue simple add name=shaping target=pppoe-out1 max-limit=<0.9xUPLOAD>M/<0.9xDOWNLOAD>M \ queue=fq-codel/fq-codel total-queue=fq-codel /queue simple print where name=shaping # Flags: X - disabled, I - invalid; D - dynamic # 0 name="shaping" target=pppoe-out1 dst-address=0.0.0.0/0 \ # interface=all parent=none priority=8/8 queue=fq-codel/fq-codel \ # limit-at=0/0 max-limit=<0.9xUPLOAD>M/<0.9xDOWNLOAD>M burst-limit=0/0 burst-threshold=0/0 \ # burst-time=0s/0s bucket-size=0.1/0.1 total-queue=fq-codel Simple queues do not apply to packets that are fast-tracked by the firewall. Fast Track bypasses the queue subsystem for performance. For the queue to work, disable the fasttrack rule or remove it entirely. # Find the fasttrack rule /ip firewall filter print where action=fasttrack-connection If a rule exists, either disable it or remove it. Be careful: removing fasttrack increases CPU load on high-throughput links. On a modern MikroTik with a CPU that can handle line-rate forwarding, the trade-off is worth it for latency. # Option A: disable the rule /ip firewall filter disable [find action=fasttrack-connection] # Option B: remove it entirely /ip firewall filter remove [find action=fasttrack-connection] After making the change, run the Cloudflare Speed Test again. You should see the bufferbloat grade improve, especially under upload load. Footnotes https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IPoE ↩ https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Point-to-Point_Protocol_over_Ethernet ↩ https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Virtual_LAN ↩ https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Carrier-grade_NAT ↩ Address Family Transition Router. The AFTR is the ISP-side endpoint of the IPv4-in-IPv6 tunnel in DS-Lite: it decapsulates subscriber IPv4 traffic, performs NAT, and routes it to the IPv4 Internet. (https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6333) ↩ https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Optical_network_terminal ↩ https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Power_over_Ethernet ↩ https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/FQ-CoDel ↩

blocks.html_en:
Warning: DS-Lite caveat.

DS-Lite is the strictest form of CGNAT: the WAN gets no IPv4 address at all, only a public IPv6 address, and IPv4 traffic is tunneled inside IPv6 to the ISP’s AFTR5. MikroTik supports the DS-Lite tunnel itself, but it doesn’t support automatically receiving the AFTR address needed to establish it. Because there’s no public IPv4 anywhere in the path, port forwarding, UPnP, inbound connections, and many remote-access tools stop working.

If your ISP offers DS-Lite or private IPv4 and you need inbound IPv4 access, ask about a paid public IPv4 add-on before you buy the router or consider switching to other ISP.

sentences.zh: 警告：DS-Lite 警告。

sentences.zh: MikroTik 本身支持 DS-Lite 隧道，但不支持自动接收建立隧道所需的 AFTR 地址。

sentences.zh: 由于路径中的任何位置都没有公共 IPv4，端口转发、UPnP、入站连接和许多远程访问工具都会停止工作。

blocks.html_en: Setting up MikroTik router

sentences.en: Setting up MikroTik router

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>MikroTik router alone</figcaption>

blocks.html_en: Start by powering on the router. Run an Ethernet cable from your laptop to any LAN port on the MikroTik, typically any port numbered 2 or higher. Leave port 1 free for the ONT uplink; that becomes your WAN port later. Open WinBox, switch to the Neighbors tab, and you should see the router listed at 192.168.88.1 (or its default MAC address). Log in using the admin user with no password, then change the default admin password immediately, because RouterOS still ships with blank or default credentials on some units. After that, run through Quick Set just enough to give the router a stable management address and local subnet. You will come back later to tear out the default wireless bridge and replace it with a cleaner configuration.

sentences.en: Start by powering on the router.

sentences.en: Run an Ethernet cable from your laptop to any LAN port on the MikroTik, typically any port numbered 2 or higher.

blocks.html_en: The optical network terminal6 sits at the edge of your home network. Run an Ethernet cable from the ONT to port 1 on the MikroTik. Once the link light comes up, the router can see the carrier signal.

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>MikroTik router connected to ONT</figcaption>

blocks.html_en: Some ISPs (mine included) bind the service to the MAC address of the router they shipped. Plug in a MikroTik with a different MAC and the connection never authenticates, even when the VLAN and PPPoE settings are correct. The fix is to clone the original router’s MAC onto the WAN port. You can read that MAC from the sticker on the ISP router or from its status page.

sentences.en: Some ISPs (mine included) bind the service to the MAC address of the router they shipped.
sentences.zh: 一些 ISP（包括我的）将服务绑定到他们发货的路由器的 MAC 地址。

sentences.en: Plug in a MikroTik with a different MAC and the connection never authenticates, even when the VLAN and PPPoE settings are correct.
sentences.zh: 插入具有不同 MAC 的 MikroTik，即使 VLAN 和 PPPoE 设置正确，连接也不会通过身份验证。

sentences.en: The fix is to clone the original router’s MAC onto the WAN port.
sentences.zh: 修复方法是将原始路由器的 MAC 克隆到 WAN 端口。

sentences.en: You can read that MAC from the sticker on the ISP router or from its status page.
sentences.zh: 您可以从 ISP 路由器上的标签或其状态页上读取该 MAC。

blocks.html_en: Clone it onto ether1. Because the VLAN interface and the PPPoE client both ride on ether1, they inherit this MAC automatically, so the ISP sees the address it expects.

sentences.en: Clone it onto ether1.
sentences.zh: 将其克隆到 ether1 上。

sentences.en: Because the VLAN interface and the PPPoE client both ride on ether1, they inherit this MAC automatically, so the ISP sees the address it expects.
sentences.zh: 由于 VLAN 接口和 PPPoE 客户端都依赖于 ether1，因此它们会自动继承此 MAC，因此 ISP 会看到它期望的地址。

blocks.html_en: The cloned MAC persists across reboots. If you ever move the connection back to the original router, revert with /interface ethernet reset-mac-address ether1 to restore the port’s factory address.

sentences.en: The cloned MAC persists across reboots.
sentences.zh: 克隆的 MAC 在重新启动后仍然存在。

sentences.en: If you ever move the connection back to the original router, revert with /interface ethernet reset-mac-address ether1 to restore the port’s factory address.
sentences.zh: 如果您将连接移回原始路由器，请使用 /interface ethernet reset-mac-address ether1 恢复以恢复端口的出厂地址。

sentences.en: Add it with a descriptive name so future-you does not have to guess what vlan1 means.
sentences.zh: 添加一个描述性名称，以便将来您不必猜测 vlan1 的含义。

sentences.en: Let’s get clean WiFi setup

blocks.html_en: For wireless, I use a separate wAP access point powered over Ethernet7. Port 8 on the router feeds both data and power to the AP. Enable PoE output on that port, and the wAP boots without a wall wart.

sentences.en: For wireless, I use a separate wAP access point powered over Ethernet7.
sentences.zh: 对于无线，我使用通过以太网供电的独立 wAP 接入点7。

sentences.en: Port 8 on the router feeds both data and power to the AP.
sentences.zh: 路由器上的端口 8 为 AP 提供数据和电源。

sentences.en: Enable PoE output on that port, and the wAP boots without a wall wart.
sentences.zh: 在该端口上启用 PoE 输出，并且 wAP 无需壁式插座即可启动。

blocks.html_en: Managing every AP individually does not scale. RouterOS includes CAPsMAN, which lets the router act as a central controller. You define a single security profile and datapath, plus channel templates for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz, and the access point downloads that configuration automatically.

sentences.en: Managing every AP individually does not scale.
sentences.zh: 单独管理每个接入点无法扩展。

sentences.en: RouterOS includes CAPsMAN, which lets the router act as a central controller.
sentences.zh: RouterOS 包括 CAPsMAN，它让路由器充当中央控制器。

sentences.en: You define a single security profile and datapath, plus channel templates for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz, and the access point downloads that configuration automatically.
sentences.zh: 您定义单个安全配置文件和数据路径，以及 2.4 GHz 和 5 GHz 的通道模板，接入点会自动下载该配置。

blocks.html_en: On the controller, create the shared objects first.

sentences.en: On the controller, create the shared objects first.
sentences.zh: 在控制器上，首先创建共享对象。

blocks.html_en: On the access point, enable CAP mode and point the radios at the manager.

sentences.en: On the access point, enable CAP mode and point the radios at the manager.
sentences.zh: 在接入点上，启用 CAP 模式并将无线电指向管理器。

blocks.html_en: Back on the controller, you should see dynamic radio entries appear. Each radio adopts the configuration that matches its band.

sentences.en: Back on the controller, you should see dynamic radio entries appear.
sentences.zh: 回到控制器上，您应该会看到出现动态无线电条目。

sentences.en: Each radio adopts the configuration that matches its band.
sentences.zh: 每个无线电都采用与其频段相匹配的配置。

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>MikroTik router with ONT, VLAN 35, PPPoE client and WiFi AP over PoE</figcaption>

sentences.en: MikroTik router with ONT, VLAN 35, PPPoE client and WiFi AP over PoE
sentences.zh: 具有 ONT、VLAN 35、PPPoE 客户端和 WiFi AP over PoE 的 MikroTik 路由器

blocks.html_en: Fighting Bufferbloat

sentences.en: Fighting Bufferbloat
sentences.zh: 对抗缓冲膨胀

blocks.html_en: During a typical evening at the weekend, I noticed something strange. I was playing Counter-Strike, but then it started lagging tue to ping flactuations. It turned out an iOS update starts on another device and a phone begins uploading photos into cloud backup. The culprit was bufferbloat.

sentences.en: During a typical evening at the weekend, I noticed something strange.
sentences.zh: 在周末的一个典型晚上，我注意到一些奇怪的事情。

sentences.en: I was playing Counter-Strike, but then it started lagging tue to ping flactuations.
sentences.zh: 我当时正在玩《反恐精英》，但周二由于 ping 波动，它开始滞后。

sentences.en: It turned out an iOS update starts on another device and a phone begins uploading photos into cloud backup.
sentences.zh: 事实证明，iOS 更新在另一台设备上启动，并且手机开始将照片上传到云备份中。

sentences.en: The culprit was bufferbloat.
sentences.zh: 罪魁祸首是缓冲区膨胀。

blocks.html_en:
Bufferbloat is excessive latency caused by overfilled packet queues inside network equipment. It shows up when a link becomes saturated, because large buffers hold packets instead of dropping or marking them quickly. Real-time traffic then waits behind bulk transfers.

Source: Bufferbloat.net

sentences.en: Bufferbloat is excessive latency caused by overfilled packet queues inside network equipment.
sentences.zh: 缓冲膨胀是由于网络设备内部数据包队列过满而导致的过度延迟。

sentences.en: It shows up when a link becomes saturated, because large buffers hold packets instead of dropping or marking them quickly.
sentences.zh: 当链路饱和时，它就会出现，因为大缓冲区会保存数据包，而不是快速丢弃或标记它们。

sentences.en: Real-time traffic then waits behind bulk transfers.
sentences.zh: 然后，实时流量会在批量传输之后等待。

sentences.en: Source: Bufferbloat.net
sentences.zh: 来源：Bufferbloat.net

blocks.html_en: Bufferbloat is excessive latency caused by overfilled packet queues inside network equipment. It shows up when a link becomes saturated, because large buffers hold packets instead of dropping or marking them quickly. Real-time traffic then waits behind bulk transfers.

sentences.en: Bufferbloat is excessive latency caused by overfilled packet queues inside network equipment.
sentences.zh: 缓冲膨胀是由于网络设备内部数据包队列过满而导致的过度延迟。

sentences.en: It shows up when a link becomes saturated, because large buffers hold packets instead of dropping or marking them quickly.
sentences.zh: 当链路饱和时，它就会出现，因为大缓冲区会保存数据包，而不是快速丢弃或标记它们。

sentences.en: Real-time traffic then waits behind bulk transfers.
sentences.zh: 然后，实时流量会在批量传输之后等待。

blocks.html_en: Source: Bufferbloat.net

sentences.en: Source: Bufferbloat.net
sentences.zh: 来源：Bufferbloat.net

blocks.html_en: The queue fills and latency spikes, leaving game packets stuck behind a backlog of bulk traffic.

sentences.en: The queue fills and latency spikes, leaving game packets stuck behind a backlog of bulk traffic.
sentences.zh: 队列已满，延迟激增，导致游戏数据包滞留在大量积压的流量后面。

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>Step 1: only Counter-Strike traffic, latency stays low</figcaption>

sentences.en: Step 1: only Counter-Strike traffic, latency stays low
sentences.zh: 第 1 步：仅 Counter-Strike 流量，延迟保持较低

blocks.html_en: With no competing traffic, the latency stays low. The game sends small packets, and the queue rarely holds more than a frame or two.

sentences.en: With no competing traffic, the latency stays low.
sentences.zh: 由于没有竞争流量，延迟保持较低。

sentences.en: The game sends small packets, and the queue rarely holds more than a frame or two.
sentences.zh: 游戏发送小数据包，队列很少容纳超过一两帧。

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>Step 2: iOS update begins, queue fills and latency rises</figcaption>

sentences.en: Step 2: iOS update begins, queue fills and latency rises
sentences.zh: 第 2 步：iOS 更新开始，队列填满且延迟增加

blocks.html_en: A download starts on another device. The buffers absorb the burst but do not drain fast enough, so latency climbs as game packets wait behind it.

sentences.en: A download starts on another device.
sentences.zh: 在另一台设备上开始下载。

sentences.en: The buffers absorb the burst but do not drain fast enough, so latency climbs as game packets wait behind it.
sentences.zh: 缓冲区吸收突发，但消耗速度不够快，因此当游戏数据包在其后面等待时，延迟会上升。

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>Step 3: photo backup joins in, queue keeps growing</figcaption>

sentences.en: Step 3: photo backup joins in, queue keeps growing
sentences.zh: 第三步：照片备份加入，队列不断增长

blocks.html_en: An upload joins the mix, and upload queues are usually the worst offender on asymmetric links. The game now faces queuing in both directions.

sentences.en: An upload joins the mix, and upload queues are usually the worst offender on asymmetric links.
sentences.zh: 上传也加入其中，上传队列通常是非对称链路上最严重的问题。

sentences.en: The game now faces queuing in both directions.
sentences.zh: 现在游戏面临着双向排队。

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>Step 4: queue full, game packets stuck behind bulk traffic</figcaption>

sentences.en: Step 4: queue full, game packets stuck behind bulk traffic
sentences.zh: 第 4 步：队列已满，游戏数据包滞留在大流量后面

blocks.html_en: The buffer is full. Even tiny game packets wait until the bulk traffic ahead of them clears, which shows up as rubber-banding and delayed voice chat.

sentences.en: The buffer is full.
sentences.zh: 缓冲区已满。

sentences.en: Even tiny game packets wait until the bulk traffic ahead of them clears, which shows up as rubber-banding and delayed voice chat.
sentences.zh: 即使是很小的游戏数据包也要等到它们前面的大量流量清除为止，这表现为橡皮筋和延迟的语音聊天。

blocks.html_en: You can measure this with online tests; I use the Cloudflare Speed Test at speed.cloudflare.com. It reports both loaded and unloaded latency so you can read the bufferbloat grade directly. DSLReports used to be the reference, but the site shut down in March 2025. You can still get a rough picture by running any speed test while pinging a stable host in a terminal.

sentences.en: You can measure this with online tests; I use the Cloudflare Speed Test at speed.cloudflare.com.
sentences.zh: 您可以通过在线测试来衡量这一点；我使用 speed.cloudflare.com 上的 Cloudflare 速度测试。

sentences.en: It reports both loaded and unloaded latency so you can read the bufferbloat grade directly.
sentences.zh: 它报告加载和卸载延迟，以便您可以直接读取缓冲区膨胀等级。

sentences.en: DSLReports used to be the reference, but the site shut down in March 2025.
sentences.zh: DSLReports 曾经是参考，但该网站于 2025 年 3 月关闭。

sentences.en: You can still get a rough picture by running any speed test while pinging a stable host in a terminal.
sentences.zh: 您仍然可以通过在终端中 ping 稳定主机时运行任何速度测试来获得粗略的情况。

blocks.html_en: FQ-CoDel to the rescue

sentences.en: FQ-CoDel to the rescue
sentences.zh: FQ-CoDel 来救援

blocks.html_en: RouterOS supports several queue disciplines. The default FIFO queue simply stores packets in the order it receives them. When the link is full, every flow waits behind every other flow. FQ-CoDel8 splits traffic into many small flows and gives each one a fair turn, dropping packets that linger in the queue. This keeps latency low without complex firewall mangle rules.

sentences.en: RouterOS supports several queue disciplines.
sentences.zh: RouterOS 支持多种队列规则。

sentences.en: The default FIFO queue simply stores packets in the order it receives them.
sentences.zh: 默认 FIFO 队列只是按照接收数据包的顺序存储数据包。

sentences.en: When the link is full, every flow waits behind every other flow.
sentences.zh: 当链路已满时，每个流都会在其他流后面等待。

sentences.en: FQ-CoDel8 splits traffic into many small flows and gives each one a fair turn, dropping packets that linger in the queue.
sentences.zh: FQ-CoDel8 将流量分成许多小流，并为每个小流提供公平的轮流，从而丢弃滞留在队列中的数据包。

sentences.en: This keeps latency low without complex firewall mangle rules.
sentences.zh: 这可以保持较低的延迟，而无需复杂的防火墙破坏规则。

blocks.html_en: <th>Queue discipline</th>

sentences.en: Queue discipline
sentences.zh: 排队纪律

blocks.html_en: <th>How it handles congestion</th>

sentences.en: How it handles congestion
sentences.zh: 它如何处理拥塞

blocks.html_en: <th>Best for</th>

sentences.en: Best for
sentences.zh: 最适合

blocks.html_en: FIFO (default-small)

sentences.en: FIFO (default-small)
sentences.zh: FIFO（默认小）

blocks.html_en: One shared queue; first in, first out

sentences.en: One shared queue; first in, first out
sentences.zh: 1个共享队列；先进先出

blocks.html_en: Low congestion, uniform traffic

sentences.en: Low congestion, uniform traffic
sentences.zh: 拥堵少，交通均匀

blocks.html_en: FQ-CoDel

sentences.en: FQ-CoDel
sentences.zh: FQ-代码

blocks.html_en: Per-flow fairness with active delay control

sentences.en: Per-flow fairness with active delay control
sentences.zh: 具有主动延迟控制的每流公平性

blocks.html_en: Gaming and VoIP on shared links

sentences.en: Gaming and VoIP on shared links
sentences.zh: 通过共享链接进行游戏和 VoIP

blocks.html_en: To use FQ-CoDel, first create a queue type since RouterOS does not include one by default.

sentences.en: To use FQ-CoDel, first create a queue type since RouterOS does not include one by default.
sentences.zh: 要使用 FQ-CoDel，首先创建一个队列类型，因为 RouterOS 默认情况下不包含队列类型。

blocks.html_en: The default parameters are a sensible starting point. The target of 5 ms defines the acceptable standing queue delay. The interval of 100 ms matches a rough worst-case RTT budget.

sentences.en: The default parameters are a sensible starting point.
sentences.zh: 默认参数是一个合理的起点。

sentences.en: The target of 5 ms defines the acceptable standing queue delay.
sentences.zh: 5 毫秒的目标定义了可接受的站立队列延迟。

sentences.en: The interval of 100 ms matches a rough worst-case RTT budget.
sentences.zh: 100 毫秒的间隔符合粗略的最坏情况 RTT 预算。

blocks.html_en: The important part is the max-limit. It must sit below your real line rate, not at it. If you shape at 100 % of the link, the ISP’s equipment still saturates first and the bloated queue forms there, outside your control. A common rule of thumb is to set the limit to about 90–95 % of the measured download and upload speeds. That keeps the bottleneck on your router, where FQ-CoDel can actually manage the queue.

sentences.en: The important part is the max-limit.
sentences.zh: 重要的部分是最大限制。

sentences.en: It must sit below your real line rate, not at it.
sentences.zh: 它必须低于您的实际线路速率，而不是它。

sentences.en: If you shape at 100 % of the link, the ISP’s equipment still saturates first and the bloated queue forms there, outside your control.
sentences.zh: 如果您以 100% 的链路整形，ISP 的设备仍然首先饱和，并且在那里形成臃肿的队列，超出了您的控制范围。

sentences.en: A common rule of thumb is to set the limit to about 90–95 % of the measured download and upload speeds.
sentences.zh: 常见的经验法则是将限制设置为测量的下载和上传速度的 90-95% 左右。

sentences.en: That keeps the bottleneck on your router, where FQ-CoDel can actually manage the queue.
sentences.zh: 这将瓶颈保留在您的路由器上，而 FQ-CoDel 可以实际管理队列。

blocks.html_en: Replace the placeholders below with your own measured values: the first number is upload, the second is download.

sentences.en: Replace the placeholders below with your own measured values: the first number is upload, the second is download.
sentences.zh: 将下面的占位符替换为您自己的测量值：第一个数字是上传，第二个数字是下载。

blocks.html_en: Simple queues do not apply to packets that are fast-tracked by the firewall. Fast Track bypasses the queue subsystem for performance. For the queue to work, disable the fasttrack rule or remove it entirely.

sentences.en: Simple queues do not apply to packets that are fast-tracked by the firewall.
sentences.zh: 简单队列不适用于防火墙快速跟踪的数据包。

sentences.en: Fast Track bypasses the queue subsystem for performance.
sentences.zh: Fast Track 绕过队列子系统以提高性能。

sentences.en: For the queue to work, disable the fasttrack rule or remove it entirely.
sentences.zh: 为了使队列正常工作，请禁用快速通道规则或将其完全删除。

blocks.html_en: If a rule exists, either disable it or remove it. Be careful: removing fasttrack increases CPU load on high-throughput links. On a modern MikroTik with a CPU that can handle line-rate forwarding, the trade-off is worth it for latency.

sentences.en: If a rule exists, either disable it or remove it.
sentences.zh: 如果规则存在，请将其禁用或删除。

sentences.en: Be careful: removing fasttrack increases CPU load on high-throughput links.
sentences.zh: 请注意：删除 fasttrack 会增加高吞吐量链路上的 CPU 负载。

sentences.en: On a modern MikroTik with a CPU that can handle line-rate forwarding, the trade-off is worth it for latency.
sentences.zh: 在具有可以处理线速转发的 CPU 的现代 MikroTik 上，为了延迟而进行的权衡是值得的。

blocks.html_en: After making the change, run the Cloudflare Speed Test again. You should see the bufferbloat grade improve, especially under upload load.

sentences.en: After making the change, run the Cloudflare Speed Test again.
sentences.zh: 进行更改后，再次运行 Cloudflare 速度测试。

sentences.en: You should see the bufferbloat grade improve, especially under upload load.
sentences.zh: 您应该会看到缓冲区膨胀等级有所提高，尤其是在上传负载下。

content_html_zh:
这一切是如何开始的……

从某个时候起，我就开始考虑如何建立我的家庭实验室。 我想在不依赖云提供商的情况下玩自己的项目，或者拥有自己的存储空间来存储备份，因为云存储的价格越来越贵。

如果没有事先正确的网络设置，任何家庭实验室都是不完整的。 鉴于我在 ISP 提供商路由器的性能和安全问题方面的经验，我希望更好地控制家庭网络上的流量。 我决定将流量重点放在有线连接上，以卸载 WiFi 并确保本地网络上的设备之间的连接尽可能快。

这就是 Mikrotik L009UiGS-RM 发挥作用的地方。 它有足够的千兆位以太网端口来连接墙上的所有以太网端口。 PoE 也是一个不错的好处，因为我可以为我的接入点供电，而无需使用壁式电源适配器。 该路由器外形小巧，可以安装在墙上。

了解您的 ISP

不过，在接触路由器之前，我需要了解您的 ISP 实际上是如何关闭互联网连接的，因为这并不那么容易。 有两件事决定您的设置，并且它们彼此独立：WAN 如何进行身份验证，以及它获得哪种 IPv4 地址。 在技​​术论坛上快速 Google 搜索或询问 ISP 支持热线通常会得到答案。

IPoE 或 PPPoE

在波兰，一些提供商插入以太网电缆并通过 DHCP 向您提供地址；这是IPoE1。 其他则需要 PPPoE2 用户名和密码，有时需要通过专用 VLAN3。 正确的设置路径完全取决于这个细节。

协议您的 ISP 为您提供什么MikroTik 上的典型设置
IPoEIP 地址、网关、WAN 上通过 DHCP 的 DNS在WAN口添加DHCP客户端
PPPoE用户名和密码，有时通过 VLAN如果需要，创建 VLAN，然后添加 PPPoE 客户端

公共或私有 WAN IPv4

该协议仅告诉您路由器如何登录。 另外，检查您收到的地址是公共地址还是私有地址，因为 WAN 端口上的私有 IPv4 地址始终意味着 CGNAT4：您的 ISP 在许多客户之间共享一个公共 IPv4 并将其转换为上游地址，因此不会主动将任何路由返回给您。

广域网 IPv4这意味着什么影响
民众专用于您的线路的可路由地址端口转发、UPnP、入站连接正常
私人（CGNAT）ISP NAT 后面的共享地址除非 ISP 出售公共 IPv4 附加组件，否则入站连接通常无法工作
警告：DS-Lite 警告。 DS-Lite 是最严格的 CGNAT 形式：WAN 根本没有 IPv4 地址，只有公共 IPv6 地址，并且 IPv4 流量在 IPv6 内部通过隧道传输到 ISP 的 AFTR5。 MikroTik 本身支持 DS-Lite 隧道，但不支持自动接收建立隧道所需的 AFTR 地址。 由于路径中的任何位置都没有公共 IPv4，端口转发、UPnP、入站连接和许多远程访问工具都会停止工作。 如果您的 ISP 提供 DS-Lite 或私有 IPv4，并且您需要入站 IPv4 访问，请在购买路由器或考虑切换到其他 ISP 之前询问付费公共 IPv4 附加组件。

对于我的光纤连接，ISP 使用带有私有 IPv4 地址的 VLAN 35 上的 PPPoE。 本文的其余部分遵循该路径。

设置 MikroTik 路由器

首先打开路由器电源。 将以太网电缆从笔记本电脑连接到 MikroTik 上的任何 LAN 端口，通常是编号为 2 或更高的任何端口。 将端口 1 留给 ONT 上行链路；稍后将成为您的 WAN 端口。 打开 WinBox，切换到“邻居”选项卡，您应该会看到 192.168.88.1（或其默认 MAC 地址）列出的路由器。 使用没有密码的管理员用户登录，然后立即更改默认管理员密码，因为 RouterOS 在某些设备上仍然附带空白或默认凭据。 之后，运行“快速设置”足以为路由器提供稳定的管理地址和本地子网。 您稍后会回来拆除默认的无线桥并用更干净的配置替换它。

上网

光网络终端6位于家庭网络的边缘。 将以太网电缆从 ONT 连接到 MikroTik 上的端口 1。 一旦链路灯亮起，路由器就可以看到载波信号。

一些 ISP（包括我的）将服务绑定到他们发货的路由器的 MAC 地址。 插入具有不同 MAC 的 MikroTik，即使 VLAN 和 PPPoE 设置正确，连接也不会通过身份验证。 修复方法是将原始路由器的 MAC 克隆到 WAN 端口。 您可以从 ISP 路由器上的标签或其状态页上读取该 MAC。

将其克隆到 ether1 上。 由于 VLAN 接口和 PPPoE 客户端都依赖于 ether1，因此它们会自动继承此 MAC，因此 ISP 会看到它期望的地址。

# Check the current MAC before changing it
/interface ethernet print where name=ether1
# Flags: X - disabled, R - running, S - slave
#  #    NAME    MTU  MAC-ADDRESS        ARP     SWITCH
#  0  R ether1  1500 48:A9:8A:11:22:33  enabled switch1
# Clone the ISP router's MAC (replace with the address from its label)
/interface ethernet set ether1 mac-address=AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
# Confirm the WAN port now advertises the cloned MAC
/interface ethernet print where name=ether1
# Flags: X - disabled, R - running, S - slave
#  #    NAME    MTU  MAC-ADDRESS        ARP     SWITCH
#  0  R ether1  1500 AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF  enabled switch1

克隆的 MAC 在重新启动后仍然存在。 如果您将连接移回原始路由器，请使用 /interface ethernet reset-mac-address ether1 恢复以恢复端口的出厂地址。

我的 ISP 使用 VLAN 35 标记 PPPoE 流量。 RouterOS 需要在 ether1 之上有一个 VLAN 接口才能使用 PPPoE。 添加一个描述性名称，以便将来您不必猜测 vlan1 的含义。

/interface vlan add name=internet-vlan-35 vlan-id=35 interface=ether1
/interface vlan print
# Flags: X - disabled, I - invalid, D - dynamic
#  NAME               MTU  ARP  VLAN-ID  INTERFACE
# 0 internet-vlan-35  1500  enabled  35       ether1

VLAN 就位后，创建 PPPoE 客户端。 告诉它使用 VLAN 接口，接受来自 ISP 的默认路由，并使用 ISP 的 DNS 服务器。 首先将用户名和密码留空；一旦界面存在，您将填写这些内容。

/interface pppoe-client add name=pppoe-out1 interface=internet-vlan-35 \
    add-default-route=yes use-peer-dns=yes disabled=no
/interface pppoe-client print
# Flags: X - disabled, I - invalid, R - running, D - dynamic
#  NAME        MTU   INTERFACE          USER  SERVICE  CALLER-ID  ENCODING  STATUS
# 0 pppoe-out1  auto  internet-vlan-35         internet                    linking

现在设置您的 ISP 提供的凭据。 状态应在几秒钟内从正在链接更改为已连接。

/interface pppoe-client set pppoe-out1 user=YOUR_ISP_USERNAME password=YOUR_ISP_PASSWORD
/interface pppoe-client print
# Flags: X - disabled, I - invalid, R - running, D - dynamic
#  NAME        MTU   INTERFACE          USER              SERVICE  CALLER-ID  ENCODING  STATUS
# 0 R pppoe-out1  auto  internet-vlan-35   YOUR_ISP_USERNAME  internet              connected

确认默认路由出现。 如果输出显示 pppoe-out1 作为网关，则流量可以到达 Internet。

/ip route print where dst-address=0.0.0.0/0
# Flags: D - dynamic; X - disabled, R - running, S - static; + - active
#  DST-ADDRESS     PREF-SRC  GATEWAY           DISTANCE
# D 0.0.0.0/0               pppoe-out1        1

让我们开始干净的 WiFi 设置

对于无线，我使用通过以太网供电的独立 wAP 接入点7。 路由器上的端口 8 为 AP 提供数据和电源。 在该端口上启用 PoE 输出，并且 wAP 无需壁式插座即可启动。

# Physical step: run an Ethernet cable from router port 8 (ether8) to the wAP AP.
# Then enable PoE output on port 8 so the wAP powers up:
/interface ethernet poe set ether8 poe-out=auto-on
/interface ethernet poe print
# NAME   POE-OUT   VOLTAGE  CURRENT
# ether8 auto-on   24.0V    210mA

单独管理每个接入点无法扩展。 RouterOS 包括 CAPsMAN，它让路由器充当中央控制器。 您定义单个安全配置文件和数据路径，以及 2.4 GHz 和 5 GHz 的通道模板，接入点会自动下载该配置。

在控制器上，首先创建共享对象。

# --- On the router (CAPsMAN controller) ---
/interface wifi security add name=home-sec \
    authentication-types=wpa2-psk,wpa3-psk \
    wps=disable passphrase=YOUR_WIFI_PASSWORD
/interface wifi channel add name=ch-2ghz band=2ghz-n width=20mhz
/interface wifi channel add name=ch-5ghz band=5ghz-ac width=20/40mhz
/interface wifi datapath add name=home-dp bridge=bridge disabled=no
/interface wifi configuration add name=home-2g ssid=HomeNetwork \
    country=YOUR_COUNTRY security=home-sec channel=ch-2ghz datapath=home-dp mode=ap
/interface wifi configuration add name=home-5g ssid=HomeNetwork \
    country=YOUR_COUNTRY security=home-sec channel=ch-5ghz datapath=home-dp mode=ap
/interface wifi capsman set enabled=yes interfaces=bridge
/interface wifi provisioning add action=create-dynamic-enabled \
    master-configuration=home-2g supported-bands=2ghz-n
/interface wifi provisioning add action=create-dynamic-enabled \
    master-configuration=home-5g supported-bands=5ghz-ac
# Verify the controller is listening
/interface wifi capsman print
#            enabled: yes
#           package: wifi-qcom
#        interfaces: bridge
# require-peer-certificate: no
#     upgrade-policy: none

在接入点上，启用 CAP 模式并将无线电指向管理器。

# --- On the wAP (CAP / managed AP) ---
/interface wifi cap set enabled=yes discovery-interfaces=bridge
/interface wifi set wifi1 configuration.manager=capsman disabled=no
/interface wifi set wifi2 configuration.manager=capsman disabled=no
# Verify the wAP has joined the controller
/interface wifi cap print
#        enabled: yes
# discovery-interfaces: bridge
#   caps-man-addresses:
#   caps-man-names:

回到控制器上，您应该会看到出现动态无线电条目。 每个无线电都采用与其频段相匹配的配置。

# Back on the controller, check that managed radios appeared
/interface wifi print
# Flags: D - dynamic
#    #    NAME                                              TYPE       ACTUAL-CONFIGURATION
#    0  D  cap1@2.4GHz                                       wifi       home-2g
#    1  D  cap1@5GHz                                         wifi       home-5g

对抗缓冲膨胀

在周末的一个典型晚上，我注意到一些奇怪的事情。 我当时正在玩《反恐精英》，但周二由于 ping 波动，它开始滞后。 事实证明，iOS 更新在另一台设备上启动，并且手机开始将照片上传到云备份中。 罪魁祸首是缓冲区膨胀。

缓冲膨胀是由于网络设备内部数据包队列过满而导致的过度延迟。 当链路饱和时，它就会出现，因为大缓冲区会保存数据包，而不是快速丢弃或标记它们。 然后，实时流量会在批量传输之后等待。 来源：Bufferbloat.net

队列已满，延迟激增，导致游戏数据包滞留在大量积压的流量后面。

由于没有竞争流量，延迟保持较低。 游戏发送小数据包，队列很少容纳超过一两帧。

在另一台设备上开始下载。 缓冲区吸收突发，但消耗速度不够快，因此当游戏数据包在其后面等待时，延迟会上升。

上传也加入其中，上传队列通常是非对称链路上最严重的问题。 现在游戏面临着双向排队。

缓冲区已满。 即使是很小的游戏数据包也要等到它们前面的大量流量清除为止，这表现为橡皮筋和延迟的语音聊天。

您可以通过在线测试来衡量这一点；我使用 speed.cloudflare.com 上的 Cloudflare 速度测试。 它报告加载和卸载延迟，以便您可以直接读取缓冲区膨胀等级。 DSLReports 曾经是参考，但该网站于 2025 年 3 月关闭。 您仍然可以通过在终端中 ping 稳定主机时运行任何速度测试来获得粗略的情况。

FQ-CoDel 来救援

RouterOS 支持多种队列规则。 默认 FIFO 队列只是按照接收数据包的顺序存储数据包。 当链路已满时，每个流都会在其他流后面等待。 FQ-CoDel8 将流量分成许多小流，并为每个小流提供公平的轮流，从而丢弃滞留在队列中的数据包。 这可以保持较低的延迟，而无需复杂的防火墙破坏规则。

排队纪律它如何处理拥塞最适合
FIFO（默认小）1个共享队列；先进先出拥堵少，交通均匀
FQ-代码具有主动延迟控制的每流公平性通过共享链接进行游戏和 VoIP

要使用 FQ-CoDel，首先创建一个队列类型，因为 RouterOS 默认情况下不包含队列类型。

/queue type add name=fq-codel kind=fq-codel
/queue type print where name=fq-codel
# Flags: * - default, X - disabled, I - invalid, D - dynamic
#  0   name="fq-codel" kind=fq-codel fq-codel-target=5ms fq-codel-interval=100ms \
#      fq-codel-ecn=yes fq-codel-flows=1024 fq-codel-quantum=1514 \
#      fq-codel-limit=10240 fq-codel-memlimit=32.0MiB

默认参数是一个合理的起点。 5 毫秒的目标定义了可接受的站立队列延迟。 100 毫秒的间隔符合粗略的最坏情况 RTT 预算。

重要的部分是最大限制。 它必须低于您的实际线路速率，而不是它。 如果您以 100% 的链路整形，ISP 的设备仍然首先饱和，并且在那里形成臃肿的队列，超出了您的控制范围。 常见的经验法则是将限制设置为测量的下载和上传速度的 90-95% 左右。 这将瓶颈保留在您的路由器上，而 FQ-CoDel 可以实际管理队列。

将下面的占位符替换为您自己的测量值：第一个数字是上传，第二个数字是下载。

/queue simple add name=shaping target=pppoe-out1 max-limit=<0.9xUPLOAD>M/<0.9xDOWNLOAD>M \
    queue=fq-codel/fq-codel total-queue=fq-codel
/queue simple print where name=shaping
# Flags: X - disabled, I - invalid; D - dynamic
#  0   name="shaping" target=pppoe-out1 dst-address=0.0.0.0/0 \
#      interface=all parent=none priority=8/8 queue=fq-codel/fq-codel \
#      limit-at=0/0 max-limit=<0.9xUPLOAD>M/<0.9xDOWNLOAD>M burst-limit=0/0 burst-threshold=0/0 \
#      burst-time=0s/0s bucket-size=0.1/0.1 total-queue=fq-codel

简单队列不适用于防火墙快速跟踪的数据包。 Fast Track 绕过队列子系统以提高性能。 为了使队列正常工作，请禁用快速通道规则或将其完全删除。

# Find the fasttrack rule
/ip firewall filter print where action=fasttrack-connection

如果规则存在，请将其禁用或删除。 请注意：删除 fasttrack 会增加高吞吐量链路上的 CPU 负载。 在具有可以处理线速转发的 CPU 的现代 MikroTik 上，为了延迟而进行的权衡是值得的。

# Option A: disable the rule
/ip firewall filter disable [find action=fasttrack-connection]

# Option B: remove it entirely
/ip firewall filter remove [find action=fasttrack-connection]

进行更改后，再次运行 Cloudflare 速度测试。 您应该会看到缓冲区膨胀等级有所提高，尤其是在上传负载下。
